_meta.keyKnowledge: We explore how Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Peoples use visual arts to continue and revitalise their cultures.

_source.w: We explore how Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Peoples use visual arts to continue and revitalise their cultures.
y: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander visual arts are among the oldest continuous artistic traditions on Earth.
Understanding how art supports cultural revitalisation shows us its power beyond decoration.
First Nations artists today are using visual arts to keep cultural knowledge alive and share it with the world.
eg: We explore what we know about First Nations artists and what we want to learn more about.
We investigate how Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander artists express connection to Country through their work.
We explore how contemporary First Nations artists blend traditional and modern approaches.
We learn about the cultural protocols involved in viewing and discussing First Nations art.
We discuss how art helps maintain languages, stories and cultural practices.
We investigate how art centres and community projects support cultural revitalisation.
